message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:p>Data visualization is an essential tool for exploring and communicating findings in medical research, especially in epidemiological surveillance. The COVID19-Tracker web application systematically produces daily updated data visualization and analysis of the SARS-CoV-2 epidemic in Spain. It collects automatically daily data on COVID-19 diagnosed cases, and mortality from February 24th, 2020 onwards. Several analyses have been developed to visualize data trends and estimating short-term projections; to estimate the case fatality rate; to assess the effect of the lockdown measures on the trends of incident data; to estimate infection time and the basic reproduction number; and to analyse the excess of mortality. The application may help for a better understanding of the SARS-CoV-2 epidemic data in Spain.</jats:p>
title: COVID19-Tracker: A shiny app to perform comprehensive data visualisation for SARS-CoV-2 epidemic in Spain
